steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that ecosystems stretch across the border, so actions on one side affect the other, making international cooperation essential.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice A, 'requires', conveys the idea that managing border environmental matters needs coordination, which matches the clue that cooperation is essential. The other three choices either praise, report, or advise coordination, none of which express the necessity implied by the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
